svg.text: Project flowchart: from concept to crawling
IK failures corrupt RL — agent outputs zeros
IK is fallible — remove it. Let RL control joints directly.
21D too large — agent holds still / dies
21D = needle in haystack. Provide rhythmic CPG structure. Reduce DOF.
Signs wrong for belly-up — robot spins in circles
Don't guess signs. Friction is broken (ice condition). Pivot to reference tracking.
Zero-gravity refs ≠ physics. Dances in place.
Can't crawl before standing. Fix friction. Solve standing first.
geom_friction [1.0, 0.005] → [3.0, 0.5] — drift: meters → 2.4 mm. All prior work was on ice conditions.
Gravity settle + spawn height + PD targets. Converged in 2M steps.
Foundation works. Revisit CPG with fixed physics, automated signs, 8-DOF.
Stand gains kill motion. Sine too smooth.
Two-gain arch. discovered. Replace sine → triangle. Increase freq 0.5 → 1.5 Hz.
Fast swing / slow stance. 6 reward revisions.
All 4 limbs cycling · no jumping · body elevated
